productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Black Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this black wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish and embossed brand name on the uppers, this tri-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 12 cm X 9.5 cmTextured synthetic leather for flexibility and durabilityTwo compartments with fabric inner lining on the insideMultiple partitions on the tri-fold to stash away cards and store coinsCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
